splash.doc: Splash text shown while the agent boots.

title.doc: Empty-state title when the user hasn't joined any circle.

body.text: Scan an invite QR or restore from a recovery phrase.

create_cta.doc: Primary action — admin creates a fresh circle.

restore_cta.doc: Tertiary — restore an identity from a mnemonic.

create_modal_body.text: You become the admin. Invite the rest with a QR after creation.

create_circle_wizard_cta.doc: M1-S2: secondary CTA linking to CreateCircleScreen.

subtitle.text: Point the camera at a Tasks QR. You can also paste instead.

unrecognised.doc: Hint shown when no classifier matches.

redeeming.doc: Status while invite redeem is in flight.

paste_link.doc: Toggle to reveal the paste textarea.

paste_placeholder.text: Paste a Tasks invite, contact link, or recovery phrase

permission_denied.text: Camera permission denied. You can paste an invite instead.

subtitle.text: Type or paste your 12 or 24 BIP-39 words. Anyone with these words controls your account.

status_wrong_count.text: Phrase must be exactly 12 or 24 words.

status_malformed_word.text: One of the words doesn’t look right.

status_looks_ok.text: Looks good — tap Restore to load it.

subtitle.text: Show this QR to a new circle member. The invite is single-use and expires soon.

camera.text: Tasks needs the camera to scan invite QR codes and take deliverable photos.

notifications.text: Tasks uses notifications to remind you about deadlines and approvals.

calendar.text: Tasks reads your calendar to flag scheduling conflicts. Optional — you can skip and configure later.

location.text: Tasks needs location access for Bluetooth-Low-Energy peer discovery on Android. The app does not record your location.

empty.text: Add a task or wait for someone in the circle to.

force_complete_body.text: Sub-tasks won't be touched. The audit log records this as a forced close.

propose_subtask.doc: V2.7 propose CTA when caller isn't the assignee.

admin_section.doc: Section header above the 41.18.1 admin/master CTAs.

revoke_body.text: The assignee will be notified and can appeal.

remove_confirm_body.text: Sub-tasks stay (you can remove them separately). Audit log keeps the history.

force_spawn_subtask.doc: Force-spawn CTA — opens Compose with reason field.

appeal.doc: Appeal CTA — only when last reviewLog entry is revoke.

subtask_of.doc: Parent reference chip on a sub-task — when the parent is in listOpen.

subtask_of_id.doc: Parent reference chip on a sub-task — when the parent isn't in listOpen (e.g. completed).

subtasks_label.doc: Section header above the sub-tasks list.

edit.doc: #226 — Edit task body CTA (visible when status is ready/waiting/blocked/claimed).

title_subtask.doc: Title when parent is set (sub-task shortcut).

title_force_spawn.doc: Title when forceSpawn route param is set.

subtask_of.doc: Subtitle banner when parent is set.

dependencies_placeholder.text: Pick tasks that must finish first…

dependencies_count.doc: Dependencies field display when selection is non-empty.

dependencies_search.doc: Search box placeholder in the deps picker.

master_clear.doc: Master picker first row — clear selection.

approval_default.doc: Approval chip — leave at substrate default.

force_spawn_reason_placeholder.text: e.g. assignee is on leave; deadline at risk

empty_assigned.text: Nothing assigned. Pick something from "Open for grabs".

empty_mastered.text: No tasks waiting on your review.

empty_claimable.text: No open claimable tasks right now.

all_clear_body.text: Nothing assigned, nothing to review, nothing claimable. Either you're caught up — or the rest of the circle is on holiday.

reason_last_chance.doc: Reason chip — last slot before deadline.

reason_no_slot.doc: Reason chip — couldn't find a slot.

blocked_hint.text: Has open dependencies — open the task to use Force-complete.

subtask_proposal_warning.text: Approving rolls your submission back to claimed.
subtask_proposal_warning.doc: Warning shown on Approve confirm modal.

generic_label.doc: Fallback label for unknown inbox event kinds.

badge_summary.doc: Header summary line above the list.

clear_all_confirm_body.text: This removes every notification from your inbox. The events in question stay on their parent tasks; only the inbox copies go away.

empty.text: You haven't joined any circles yet.
empty.doc: Empty state — user belongs to zero circles.

counter_open.doc: Counter label — open tasks in the circle.

counter_mine.doc: Counter label — tasks assigned to me.

jump_in.doc: CTA on a circle row that switches active + navigates Workspace.

new_circle.doc: FAB on the dashboard for creating another circle.

not_opted_in.text: Opted out — your cells stay hidden.

circle_disabled.text: This circle has availability hints turned off.

tap_hint.text: Tap a cell to cycle through states.

handle_bad_chars.text: Handle can only use a–z, 0–9, - and _.

recovery_body.text: Use this 12-word phrase to restore your account on another device. Anyone with the words has full access — keep them somewhere safe.

recovery_warning.text: Don't screenshot. Anyone with these words controls your account.

unknown_member.text: Member not found in this circle.

edit_skills_cta.text: Edit my offerings for this circle

edit_skills_hint.text: Pick from the circle's vocabulary or add free-form tags.

calendar_live_pending.text: Live native sync — waiting for first event.
calendar_live_pending.doc: Status line under calendarSyncMethod when native+live is enabled but hasn't fired yet.

calendar_live_last_sync.doc: Status line after a successful live diff.

section_more.doc: Section header for diagnostics + privacy entry-points.

cadence_hint.text: Override how often you get pinged for each event type.

diagnostics_hint.text: Relay rtt, queue depth, skill counters.

privacy_hint.text: What's encrypted, what the relay sees, mobile-specific items.

issue_token_cta.doc: CTA — issue a cap-token QR for someone else's bot.

issue_token_todo.doc: Placeholder alert until Phase 41.13 wires the QR flow.

compensation_disabled.text: Compensation is disabled for this circle.

calendar_disabled.text: Calendar feed is disabled for this circle.

availability_admin_hint.text: When on, members can opt in to share a coarse weekly view.

section_circle_config.doc: Section header — read-only circle config dump.

cadence_intro.text: How often the circle pings members for each event. Empty = baseline. ms.

lifecycle_hint_paused.text: addTask is blocked. Existing tasks still progress.

lifecycle_hint_archived.text: Read-only. No new tasks. Members can still see history.

lifecycle_state_paused_member.text: This circle is paused — admins disabled new tasks.

lifecycle_archive_confirm_body.text: Members will see the circle as read-only. You can unarchive later. The pod data stays.

lifecycle_unarchive_confirm_body.text: addTask + dispatch resume; members go back to active mode.

circle_config_hint.text: Read-only JSON. Useful when filing a support ticket.

subtitle.text: Show this QR to the device that runs the bot. The cap-token is single-use; revoke from Circle settings if you misplace it.

generating.doc: Body before the QR is ready.

subtitle.text: Optional. Tasks works fully offline; signing in lets your tasks sync to your pod.

cancelled.doc: Body when the user backs out of the OIDC flow.

attach_unavailable.text: Pod attachment is unavailable in this build.

section_me.doc: Section header for the personal-area links.

pod_signed_in.doc: Link to PodSignIn (signed-in state — re-enter to manage).

signed_out_title.doc: Header label when no identity has loaded yet.

in_circle.doc: Header subtitle showing the active circle.

no_active_circle.doc: Header subtitle when no circle is active.

hint.text: Read-only counters from getMetrics. Pull to refresh.

no_thread.doc: Empty state — threadId missing from route params.

unknown_peer.doc: Header label when we can't resolve the counterparty.

empty.text: No messages yet. Send the first one.

appeal_empty.text: Send your first message to open the appeal. The master will be notified.
appeal_empty.doc: Empty thread body when route carries appealForTaskId.

intro.text: Toggle existing tags + add new ones. Choices stay in this circle unless you opt to mirror them on your canonical profile.

section_prefilled.doc: Section header for skills already on my profile.

section_suggestions.doc: Section header for unclaimed circle vocabulary entries.

section_freeform.doc: Section header for the freeform input.

persist_hint.text: Off (default): only this circle sees these. On: future circles prefill from this list too.

intro.text: Override the circle's per-event cadence (in milliseconds). Empty = inherit. The 'effective' column shows what'll actually fire.
Closed-beta privacy notice. Same items as the desktop /privacy.html, plus mobile-only items for camera, push, native calendar, and BLE.

subtitle.text: Choose a storage policy before creating.

id_error.text: Use lowercase letters, digits and hyphens only.

policy_hint_no-pod.text: All tasks stay on-device. No Solid pod needed.

policy_hint_centralised.text: All tasks go to a single group pod. Ideal for small households.

policy_hint_decentralised.text: Each member's tasks stay on their own pod. Most private.

policy_hint_hybrid.text: Personal tasks on own pod; shared tasks on group pod.

policy_hint_no-pod.text: All tasks stay on-device. No Solid pod needed.

policy_hint_centralised.text: All tasks go to a single group pod.

policy_hint_decentralised.text: Each member's tasks stay on their own pod.

policy_hint_hybrid.text: Personal tasks on own pod; shared tasks on group pod.

upgrade_hint.text: This is one-way — you cannot downgrade once a pod is attached.

registry_hint.text: The agent-registry records which capabilities this device exposes (tasks, tasks-v0, circle:<id>). Registered when a meshAgent + substrate are both available.

signin_body.text: Signing in to a Solid pod lets your tasks sync across devices via your personal data store. Optional — Tasks works fully offline.
